Class PetsButton

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.control.Control
javafx.scene.control.Labeled
javafx.scene.control.ButtonBase
javafx.scene.control.Button
Main.Button.BaseButton
Main.Button.PetsButton
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.scene.control.Skinnable, Clickable
public class PetsButton extends BaseButton
Button used for selecting pets in the pet selection interface. This class extends BaseButton and displays pet information including the pet image, name, and favorite button.

  • Constructor Details

    • PetsButton

      public PetsButton(Pet pet, int txtSize, double MarginBtm)
      Initializes the button using pet data, sets image properties, creates outlined text, and overlays a FavoriteButton.
      Parameters:
      pet - pet object used to populate button data
      txtSize - text size for the pet name
      MarginBtm - margin used to position the text
